summary: Iteration 29 testing completed - All collapsible sections and Smart Import features verified. Project Information, Timeline/Gantt Chart, and Overall Summary sections collapse/expand correctly with ChevronRight/ChevronDown icon toggles. Smart Import button exists and parsing logic for Profit Margin %, Nego Buffer %, and Contingency Absolute is implemented.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height - recharts library issue but does not affect functionality (existing issue from iteration 28)

Smart Import parsing correctly handles Profit Margin %, Nego Buffer %, and Contingency Absolute
Icons toggle correctly between ChevronRight (collapsed) and ChevronDown (expanded)
All sections expanded by default - good UX behavior
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing project: ewf (PRJ-0022 v1, id: bcb545cf-efb8-4b5f-b5d4-8db988080a68)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 tested collapsible sections feature and Smart Import parsing. Three collapsible sections exist: 1) Project Information (toggleSection key: 'projectInfo'), 2) Timeline/Gantt Chart (toggleSection key: 'gantt', only shows when projectId exists), 3) Overall Summary (toggleSection key: 'summary'). All use ChevronRight/ChevronDown icons from lucide-react. Smart Import dialog shows wave/resource counts in a table. Smart Import parses PM% and NB% from Summary sheet rows 5-6, and Contingency Absolute from wave sheet logistics sections.
